creator: systemoperator@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, 14 Sep 2006 11:05:23 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Because I don't consider the matter to be urgent, it'll be fixed with
the next common release of the port.

Michael
